# ASO Screenshots Studio

App Store screenshot generator with AI hero enhancement (gpt-image-2 via fal.ai).

## State API

All editor state is mirrored to `~/.aso-studio/state.json` and exposed via REST:

- `GET  http://localhost:5181/api/studio-state`       — read full state
- `POST http://localhost:5181/api/studio-state/push`  — write + broadcast to browser (no reload needed)

Push JSON body = full state object. Browser updates live via SSE.

## Key state fields

- `appName`, `appColor` — project metadata
- `screenshots[]` — array of slots; each has `device` (iphone|ipad), `kind` (action|regular), `headline`, `action.ingredients`, `action.ingredientParams`
- `action.themeHint` — natural-language description of desired AI hero background
- `action.ingredientParams.*` — text values for each hero ingredient toggle (empty string = AI infers from context)

## Full documentation

`GET http://localhost:5181/llms-full.txt`
